# 📢  Last Chance: Get Free Live Training to Set up an Affiliate Program

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-06-17 14:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 856

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Want to boost your eCommerce sales without spending money
upfront?

With an affiliate program, other people promote your store for
free. You only pay them after they bring in real sales.

And tomorrow, we’re going to show you exactly how to set it all
up. Don’t miss out!

👉 Join the FREE Workshop: Get More Sales with an Affiliate
Program ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..g7dhj5cVKPu9Zy3WSTxn1SwBr-WJmKU8V_WU3Ow1MZg )
🗓️ Goes live on 18th June at 10:30 AM EST

Here's what you'll learn:

- Should you set up an affiliate program for your eCommerce
business?

- How to launch your affiliate program in WordPress (it’s easier
than you think)

- Where to find your first 10 affiliates (they're already in your
audience)

- How to get your program up and running fast, plus grab a Swag
Bag 🎁

At the end, stick around for a live Q&A with our workshop host,
Ryan Priddey. He’ll answer all of your affiliate program
questions.

If you’ve been looking for a smarter way to grow your store, this
is it.

Click here to save your FREE spot before registration closes! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..g7dhj5cVKPu9Zy3WSTxn1SwBr-WJmKU8V_WU3Ow1MZg ) ⏰

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
